title: Walking distance to EMU, 2+1 apartment
description: Bright 2+1 apartment with balcony, fully equipped kitchen, and fast fiber internet. Located 7 minutes on foot from Eastern Mediterranean University. Ideal for two students or a small family.

title: Student looking for a roommate
description: Private room in a shared 3-bedroom flat. The student is clean, friendly, and prefers a quiet roommate. Utilities are split evenly.

title: Modern studio near EMU
description: Compact studio with modern finishes, smart storage, and on-site laundry. Perfect for a single student who wants privacy and quick campus access.

title: 3+1 apartment with sea view
description: Spacious 3+1 with panoramic sea view, large living room, and two balconies. Walking distance to cafes and the beach.

title: Roommate needed near EMU campus
description: Shared 2-bedroom flat with a calm study atmosphere. Includes a desk, wardrobe, and shared balcony. Looking for a tidy student.
